title: Trailer Plus
description: Get the official trailer look in Minecraft with Trailer Plus Modpack with shaders textures & mods.
body:
**Trailer Plus** is a visual-focused Minecraft modpack designed to replicate the stunning look and feel of Minecraft’s official trailers. It combines optimized performance mods, high-quality resource packs, and custom shader settings to deliver a smooth, cinematic experience.

Built on **Fabric 1.20.1 - latest**, this pack runs well even on mid-range systems while still looking gorgeous.

![TRAIL3R](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf414f843231403c934e0c4ae170c24d110e37df.png)

---

## 🎮 Features

* 🖼️ **Trailer-like visuals** with clean textures and expressive animations
* 🎧 **Immersive sounds** – footsteps, ambient, physics-based audio
* 🎬 **Smooth animations** – player, mob, and UI enhancements
* ⚙️ **Optimized performance** – sodium, c2me, ferritecore, and more
* 🌈 **Custom shaders** – Complementary & BSL tuned to look cinematic

---

## 📦 Included Mods (Fabric 1.20.1 - latest)

> Here are just some of the powerful mods included:

* `Sodium`, `Sodium Extra`, `Iris`, `FerriteCore`, `C2ME`, `EntityCulling`, `ImmediatelyFast` – ⚡ FPS Boosters
* `Zoomify`, `ModelFix`, `Spawn Animations`, `NotEnoughAnimations`, `Presence Footsteps` – 🔁 Cinematic Enhancements
* `Sound Physics Remastered`, `Ambient Sounds`, `DripSounds` – 🎧 Realistic Soundscape
* `CreativeCore`, `ForgeConfigAPI`, `PuzzlesLib`, `ModMenu` – 🧰 Utilities & Compatibility

---

## 🎨 Resource Packs

These packs are included to give Minecraft that clean, stylized trailer look:

* **Bare Bones** – minimal, flat textures
* **Fresh Animations** – expressive mob animations
* **FA+ Emissive** – glowing textures
* **Simple Grass Flowers** – small aesthetic details
* **Trailers Vision** – custom cinematic overlay & tweaks

---

## 🌟 Shaders

> Choose between two powerful shaders with pre-configured settings:

* 🎥 **Complementary Shaders** – soft lighting, clean shadows, no noise
* 🎬 **BSL Shaders** – cinematic effects, lens flares, color grading
* 🛠️ **Custom Settings** – tuned for depth of field, bloom, and warm tones

---

## ✅ Requirements

* Minecraft 1.20.1 - latest (Fabric)
* At least **4GB RAM allocated**
* GPU with **shader support** (GTX 1050 / RX 560 or better recommended)

---

## 📷 Perfect For

* YouTube trailers & cinematic shorts
* Screenshot lovers and builders
* Players who want a clean, modern look

---
